notable_phrases: Microsoft Cloud delivered over $28 billion in quarterly revenue, up 22% and 25% in constant currency
we now have more than 2,500 Azure OpenAI service customers up 10x quarter over quarter
our focus is going to be, and will be, on continuing to take a growing share
summary: Microsoft demonstrates strong cloud and AI momentum with Azure OpenAI scaling rapidly while managing optimization headwinds and positioning for market share gains through copilot monetization across the platform.
